title: West Ham United's London Stadium 3D Puzzle, multi coloured
features: This superb replica stadium puzzle features 156 pieces and is ideal for footie fans aged seven to 70
Ideal for any football fan that enjoys a bit of a puzzle challenge
description: From the manufacturer Are you searching for the perfect gift for a West ham fan? Are you searching for the perfect gift for a West Ham United fan? Well it's time to call off your search thanks to the exciting 3D puzzle which features one of England's most famous stadiums – the Olympic Stadium, the home ground of the West Ham United Football team. This high quality, challenging and fun replica stadium puzzle is designed for children aged seven and upwards although younger children may need a bit of help from Mum or Dad. It's fantastically rewarding to create and a great family activity. The London Stadium in your home! The Olympic stadium can be recreated in spectacular colour and detail in around three-five hours without the need for scissors, tools or glue making it a must for all West Ham fans. This sturdy stadium features pieces which slot together requiring inventiveness, skill and patience to create a strikingly detailed model of West Ham's home ground. The 3D Olympic stadium puzzle is perfect for individuals who like a challenge but it also works wonderfully as a family activity - great for banishing school holiday boredom and a fantastic rainy day activity. A unique gift! This is a unique gift with a difference - perfect for any Hammer's fan and anyone who enjoys football and a bit of a challenge! Suitable for age 7 years and over. 156 piece puzzle. The Olympic Stadium 3D puzzle can be recreated in 3-5 hours without the need for scissors, tools or glue.
